name: add-tests
description: Add unit tests for untested modules

steps.task: Analyze the project to identify all modules without test coverage. List each untested file and its exported functions. Determine the test framework ({{framework}}) and write a test plan. Do not write tests yet.

Write unit tests for the untested modules identified in step 1 using {{framework}}. Target {{coverage-target}}% coverage. Each test file should cover: happy path, edge cases, and error conditions. Ensure all tests pass.
Run the full test suite and verify all new and existing tests pass. Fix any integration issues. Update README if test running instructions are missing or outdated.
